name: Jellyfin ListenBrainz Plugin
description: Scrobble your music to ListenBrainz, send now playing notifications, and love/hate tracks directly from Jellyfin.
overview: Integrates Jellyfin with ListenBrainz for automatic scrobbling, now playing notifications, and track feedback (love/hate). Uses the ListenBrainz API with simple token-based authentication.

versions.changelog: - v1.0.0.0: Initial release with scrobbling, now playing, love/hate, auto-love, and configuration panel.
